project_type: Course final prototype / compound AI system
goal: Reduce airline policy lookup workload while keeping risky or unsupported policy decisions under human control.
business_problem: Airline customer support agents spend repeated manual effort searching fragmented policy documents, creating slow responses, inconsistent answers, and avoidable operating cost.
offline_pipeline: load static airline policy text files
embed chunks with an OpenAI-compatible API
store vectors in a local FAISS index
save chunk metadata and policy manifest
online_pipeline: resolve standalone or follow-up user question
retrieve top-k policy chunks from FAISS
detect unsupported policy area or lightweight source conflict
generate answer from retrieved context only
verify answer support against retrieved text
return answer, clarification, or human handoff
persist conversation turns and source metadata

additional_checks: standalone ambiguous fragment asks for user goal
unsupported onboard-service question transfers to customer service
